  "findings": [
    "Luminaires located within the tub zone lack the required damp or wet location rating."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace the non-compliant fixture with a luminaire marked suitable for damp locations, or suitable for wet locations if subject to shower spray."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under NEC 410.10(D), luminaires located within 3 feet horizontally and 8 feet vertically from the top of a bathtub rim or shower threshold must be marked for damp locations, or marked for wet locations where subject to shower spray. Installing a standard dry-location fixture in this zone is a code violation and poses a severe shock hazard.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 410.10(D)"
  ]
}
